description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the microsoft/dotnet:latest Docker image and defines a DOCKER_DRIVER variable set to overlay2. Define two stages: build and publish. Add a build job named build that runs in the build stage, executes "cd Sbatman.Networking" then "dotnet build -c release", and publishes the Release and Debug binaries from Sbatman.Networking/bin/Release and Sbatman.Networking/bin/Debug as artifacts. Add a nuget job named nuget that runs in the publish stage, only on the master branch, executes "cd Sbatman.Networking", "dotnet pack -c release", "cd bin/release/", and "dotnet nuget push *.nupkg -k $NUGETKEY -s https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json", and also stores the same artifact paths. No services or caches are defined.
